title: Amazon, eBay, Newegg & Shopify Price & Stock Monitor

startUrls.title: Product page URLs
startUrls.description: Paste links to the exact product pages you want to watch. We auto-detect Amazon, eBay, Newegg, and Shopify. For Shopify, use a URL that contains /products/.
startUrls.sectionDescription: Add direct product links and/or keyword searches below. You need at least one of these two sections filled in.

searches.title: Keyword searches (optional)
searches.description: Instead of pasting URLs, search Amazon, eBay, or Newegg by keyword and track the top matching products. Leave empty if you only use product URLs above.

keyword.title: Search keyword
keyword.description: What to search for, e.g. wireless mouse, RTX 4070, airpods pro.

platform.title: Store
platform.description: Which store to run the search on. Shopify is not supported for keyword search — use product URLs instead.

maxResults.title: Max products to track
maxResults.description: How many products from the search results to open and monitor (1–50).

trackHistory.title: Save price history
trackHistory.description: Keep a running history of each product’s price so you can see lowest, highest, and average over time.
trackHistory.sectionDescription: Control when you get notified about price drops, stock changes, and restocks.

alertOnPriceDrop.title: Alert when price drops
alertOnPriceDrop.description: Mark a product as an alert when the price falls by at least the threshold below.

priceDropThresholdPercent.title: Minimum price drop to alert (%)
priceDropThresholdPercent.description: Example: 5 means you only get a price-drop alert if the price falls by 5% or more. Use 0 to alert on any decrease.

alertOnAnyPriceChange.title: Alert on any price change
alertOnAnyPriceChange.description: Also alert when the price goes up, not just down. Useful for competitor tracking.

alertOnStockChange.title: Alert when stock status changes
alertOnStockChange.description: Get notified when an item goes from in stock to out of stock, or the other way around.

alertOnBackInStock.title: Alert when back in stock
alertOnBackInStock.description: Get a dedicated alert when a product that was out of stock becomes available again.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy settings
proxyConfiguration.description: Use Apify Proxy with US Residential for best results on Amazon and eBay. Leave the default unless you know you need something else.
proxyConfiguration.sectionDescription: Residential US proxy helps avoid blocks on Amazon and eBay.
